name: CloudHand
description: Control your local Chrome browser from remote OpenClaw. Bridges AI to your real browser via WebSocket.

autoStart.description: Auto-start the bridge server when Gateway starts (default: true)

port.label: Bridge Server Port
port.help: Port for the CloudHand WebSocket bridge server. Default: 9876.

autoStart.label: Auto Start
autoStart.help: Automatically start the bridge server when OpenClaw Gateway starts.
